questions.question: Does handle_init call _emit_state_changed(server, 'loading') BEFORE spawning the background thread?
questions.actionable_check: Read textbrush/ipc/handler.py handle_init method; verify _emit_state_changed(server, 'loading') appears before threading.Thread(...).start()
evidence_required: Line number in handler.py where _emit_state_changed(server, 'loading') is called
Line number where threading.Thread(...).start() is called
Confirmation that loading call precedes thread start
questions.pass_criteria: _emit_state_changed(server, 'loading') is called synchronously in handle_init before threading.Thread(...).start()

questions.question: Is the loading emission unconditional — not inside any if/else branch?
questions.actionable_check: Read the handle_init method in handler.py; confirm _emit_state_changed(server, 'loading') is at the top level of handle_init, not inside a conditional
evidence_required: Code excerpt showing the placement of _emit_state_changed(server, 'loading') call
Confirmation that no if/else wraps the call
questions.pass_criteria: _emit_state_changed(server, 'loading') is called unconditionally at the top level of handle_init before any branching logic

questions.question: Does _init_backend contain any call to _emit_state_changed with state='loading'?
questions.actionable_check: Read the _init_backend method in handler.py; confirm no _emit_state_changed(server, 'loading') call is present there
evidence_required: Code excerpt of _init_backend to show its state emissions

questions.question: Does test_init_emits_loading_state_first exist in TestInitCommand and verify the first STATE_CHANGED has state='loading'?
questions.actionable_check: Run: source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/test_ipc_handler.py::TestInitCommand::test_init_emits_loading_state_first -v; verify it exists and passes
questions.pass_criteria: test_init_emits_loading_state_first exists in TestInitCommand and passes

questions.question: Does a second test (test_init_emits_loading_unconditionally) verify that loading is emitted regardless of payload variation?
Do all pre-existing TestInitCommand tests still pass?
questions.actionable_check: Run: source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/test_ipc_handler.py::TestInitCommand -v; all 5 tests pass
evidence_required: Full test output showing all TestInitCommand tests PASSED
questions.pass_criteria: All 5 TestInitCommand tests pass (3 pre-existing + 2 new)

questions.question: Does the e2e_smoke test TestBackendLoadingStateEmission::test_handle_init_emits_loading_before_idle pass?
questions.pass_criteria: The e2e_smoke test exists and passes

questions.question: Does ruff linting pass on all modified files?
questions.actionable_check: Run: source venv/bin/activate && python -m ruff check textbrush/ipc/handler.py tests/test_ipc_handler.py tests/e2e/test_full_workflow.py
questions.pass_criteria: All modified files pass ruff linting with no errors

mandatory_questions.question: Does the full unit test suite pass with no regressions?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run: source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/test_cli.py tests/test_weights.py tests/test_config.py tests/test_ipc_handler.py -q --tb=short
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All unit tests pass with no failures (188+ passing)
